Package microui.util

Class Debugger.TextConfig

java.lang.Object
microui.util.Debugger.TextConfig
Enclosing class:
Debugger
public static final class Debugger.TextConfig extends Object
TextConfig is a class containing settings for text drawing.

    • setSize

      public static void setSize(int size)
      Setter for text size. (Text size must be greater than 1)
      Parameters:
      size - for text size
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is lower or equal to 1
